_comment: Key Driver + Tension template strings per layer. Source: AGENT2_SPEC_TEIL6 Section 19
_usage: Templates use {placeholder} syntax. Filled at runtime with actual data values.

net_liquidity.strong_positive: Net Liquidity expanding at {pctl}th pctl, +{delta_5d}B in 5d
net_liquidity.positive: Net Liquidity positive at {pctl}th pctl, moderate expansion
net_liquidity.neutral: Net Liquidity flat near {pctl}th pctl — no clear direction
net_liquidity.negative: Net Liquidity contracting at {pctl}th pctl, {delta_5d}B in 5d
net_liquidity.strong_negative: Net Liquidity in DRAIN: {pctl}th pctl, {delta_5d}B in 5d

drivers.rrp_falling: driven by RRP drain (RRP at {rrp_pctl}th pctl, {rrp_delta_5d}B in 5d)

tension_templates.rrp_vs_mmf: RRP draining (bullish) BUT MMF assets rising (liquidity not yet in risk assets)
tension_templates.walcl_vs_tga: WALCL expanding BUT TGA rebuilding offsetting gains

yield_curve.inverted: Yield curve inverted: 2Y10Y at {value}bps — recession signal active
yield_curve.flattening: Yield curve flattening: 2Y10Y at {value}bps, was {value_21d_ago}bps 21d ago

credit.tight: HY spreads tight at {hy_pctl}th pctl — credit conditions accommodative
credit.stress: HY spreads at {hy_pctl}th pctl, IG at {ig_pctl}th pctl — credit stress building

financial_conditions.loose: Financial conditions loose: NFCI at {nfci_value} (below zero = accommodative)
financial_conditions.tightening: Financial conditions tightening: NFCI at {nfci_value}, rising {nfci_direction}

breadth.negative: Market breadth narrowing: only {value}% above 200d MA
breadth.strong_negative: Market breadth collapsed: {value}% above 200d MA — rally extremely narrow

new_highs.positive: New Highs minus New Lows at {pctl}th pctl — broad participation
new_highs.negative: New Highs collapsing at {pctl}th pctl — divergence from index

dollar.strong_positive: DXY weakening at {pctl}th pctl — favorable for EM/commodities
dollar.neutral: DXY flat at {pctl}th pctl — no clear FX pressure
dollar.negative: DXY strengthening at {pctl}th pctl — pressure on EM assets
dollar.strong_negative: DXY surge at {pctl}th pctl — potential EM squeeze

china.stress: USD/CNH at {usdcnh_pctl}th pctl, China 10Y {china_10y_direction} — China stress rising
china.easing: China 10Y {china_10y_direction}, USD/CNH at {usdcnh_pctl}th pctl — China easing underway

positioning.capitulation: Positioning at capitulation levels: NAAIM at {naaim_pctl}th pctl, AAII at {aaii_pctl}th pctl — contrarian bullish
positioning.fear: Positioning fearful: NAAIM at {naaim_pctl}th pctl — contrarian positive
positioning.neutral: Positioning neutral — no contrarian signal from sentiment
positioning.optimism: Positioning elevated: NAAIM at {naaim_pctl}th pctl — crowding risk building
positioning.euphoria: Positioning at extreme bullish levels: NAAIM at {naaim_pctl}th pctl, COT ES at {cot_es_pctl}th pctl — contrarian BEARISH

cu_au.risk_on: Cu/Au ratio at {pctl}th pctl — cyclical outperformance, growth optimism
cu_au.neutral: Cu/Au ratio neutral at {pctl}th pctl — no clear rotation signal
cu_au.defensive: Cu/Au ratio falling at {pctl}th pctl — defensive rotation underway

oil_curve.backwardation: WTI curve in backwardation ({value}) — demand strength
oil_curve.contango: WTI curve in contango ({value}) — demand weakness / oversupply

policy_stance.easing: IC consensus: Fed pivoting dovish. 2Y10Y at {spread_value}bps supports easing narrative
policy_stance.neutral: CB policy neutral. NFCI at {nfci_value}, no strong directional bias
policy_stance.tightening: IC consensus: Fed hawkish. Real yield at {real_yield_value}%, financial conditions tightening
policy_stance.emergency: Discount window spike ({disc_window_direction}), financial stress indicators elevated

vol_regime.calm: VIX at {vix_pctl}th pctl, term structure in contango ({vts_value}) — tail risk low
vol_regime.elevated: VIX rising at {vix_pctl}th pctl, IV/RV spread at {ivrv_value} — risk building
vol_regime.acute: VIX spike at {vix_pctl}th pctl, term structure inverted ({vts_value}) — acute stress
vol_regime.crisis: VIX extreme at {vix_pctl}th pctl, HY velocity {hy_velocity} — systemic stress
